channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya drafts regulations to license and oversee cryptocurrency service providers
item.description: Kenya has moved a step closer to regulating its fast-growing cryptocurrency and digital assets sector, following the development of draft regulations meant to operationalize the Virtual Asset Service ...

item.title: DOTr Orders Strict Monitoring of Airport Security After Theft at NAIA
item.description: The Department of Transportation (DOTr) has issued a directive for stricter monitoring of airport security screening officers following an incident at Ninoy Aquino International Airport (NAIA) where t...

item.title: Study Warns Climate Change Could Expand Range of Venomous Snakes to Coastal Urban Areas
item.description: A recent global study has found that climate change is likely to alter the habitats of venomous snakes, pushing them from the hotter, arid interiors of continents toward cooler and more densely popula...

item.title: Azam FC to host Simba SC in decisive Premier League game
item.description: Today, Azam FC will welcome Simba SC at the Azam Complex in Chamazi, Dar es Salaam, for a key Mainland Premier League fixture. Simba SC sit at second place on the table with 34 points from 15 matches,...

item.title: Security Forces Thwart Taliban Attack at Ghulam Khan Border Post in KP, Heavy Casualties Reported
item.description: On the night between April 2 and April 3, 2026, Pakistani security forces successfully foiled a planned assault by Afghan Taliban and terrorist elements on a border post in Ghulam Khan Sector, Khyber ...

item.title: Historic Muizenberg Battle Landscape Gains Provincial Heritage Protection
item.description: The Battle of Muizenberg site, where British and Dutch forces clashed in 1795, has officially been declared a Provincial Heritage Site. The announcement, confirmed by the City of Cape Town after being...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV’s Easter message urges peace and rejection of war
item.description: During his Easter Sunday 'Urbi et Orbi' message at the Vatican on April 5, 2026, Pope Leo XIV, the first American-born pope, delivered a powerful appeal to world leaders to end ongoing wars and abando...

item.title: Air Peace Flight From London to Nigeria Delayed Overnight, Passengers Accommodated in Hotel
item.description: Passengers for the Air Peace flight from London Heathrow to Nigeria were left vexed after their flight was delayed multiple times. The flight was first scheduled to leave at 9:20 p.m. on Saturday but ...

item.title: Nigerian Family Struggles to Find Daughter Missing Since 2022 Amid Trafficking Concerns
item.description: For the past four years, the Lawal family from Nigeria don dey look for their daughter, Halimat Oluwadamilola Boluwatife Lawal, wey dem suspect say human traffickers carry go Libya in January 2022. Ha...

item.title: Tanzanian Presidential Candidates Discuss Political Harmony and National Development
item.description: On 1st April 2026, President Samia Suluhu Hassan held a meeting with the leaders from 16 political parties who contested in the 2026 General Elections. The discussions focused on strategies to strengt...

item.title: Essendon Show Grit in Third Quarter Despite Bulldogs’ Dominance
item.description: On Easter Sunday at Marvel Stadium, the Essendon Bombers displayed grit and resilience against a Western Bulldogs side that had dominated early. Despite trailing heavily at half-time, Essendon fought ...

item.title: Pepsi ends Wireless Festival sponsorship amid backlash over Kanye West headlining
item.description: Pepsi has withdrawn its sponsorship from the Wireless Festival after controversy erupted over the booking of Kanye West, who is set to headline all three nights of the event in London’s Finsbury Park ...

item.title: Stakeholders Discuss Strategies to Enhance Tanzania's Healthcare Efficiency and Leadership
item.description: Dar es Salaam hosted a key event at Johari Rotana Hotel focusing on transforming Tanzania's healthcare system. Titled 'Advancing Tanzania's Health System Efficiency and Leadership Through Multidiscipl...

item.title: Jet Fuel Supply Issues Affect Several Italian Airports Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Several airports across Italy have recently reported shortages of jet fuel as disruptions to global energy supply lines ripple through Europe, partly linked to the continued instability in the Middle ...

item.title: The Prince and Princess of Wales attend Easter service with their children following Kate's cancer diagnosis
item.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales, along with their three children, attended the Royal Family's traditional Easter Matins service at St George's Chapel, Windsor Castle, marking their first appearance a...

item.title: Rotary Club of Dar es Salaam trains primary school teachers on inclusive education methods
item.description: DAR ES SALAAM – Rotary Club of Dar es Salaam, through its Gift of Education project, recently organized a two-day capacity-building seminar for primary school teachers in Kinondoni Municipality. This ...

item.title: Samsung Announces 2026 OLED and Frame TVs with Enhanced Art Displays and Performance
item.description: Samsung has unveiled its 2026 lineup of TVs, highlighting new versions of its Frame and OLED series. The Frame TVs, known for their artistic display mode, now feature improved glare-resistant matte sc...

item.title: British Father and Son Face Arrest and Torture in Dubai Amid Business Disputes
item.description: Albert Douglas, a British businessman, and his son Wolfgang, became prominent figures in Dubai's booming property and construction sector. They enjoyed a lavish lifestyle in the city, participating in...

item.title: Supreme Court limits Colorado’s conversion therapy ban but leaves room for future regulation
item.description: In an 8-1 decision authored by Justice Neil Gorsuch, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled that Colorado’s ban on conversion therapy for minors likely violated the First Amendment when applied to talk-based th...

item.title: Rising Fuel Costs Strain UK Fish and Chip Industry Amid Global Conflicts
item.description: The ongoing war in the Middle East has significantly impacted Britain's fish and chip sector, causing a surge in fuel and energy prices. Peter Bruce, a fisherman from Peterhead in Scotland, has seen d...
